creator: tomek@cedro.info
text:
Hello world :-)

Thank you for easy guided setup of encrypted ZFS root via bsdinstall. However not always using whole disk is sensible/desired. When installing on a laptop where other operating systems must also reside a given size of FreeBSD zroot would be nice to have.

I have wasted some precious days to setup encrypted ZFS root by hand using simple shell and still some things could be done better when I simply had partition size option during guided setup.

Best regards :-)
Tomek CEDRO
